utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The format requests 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six top-level items with details. Now verify each is fully specified per item description: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (address, type, price, features, viewing date, confirmation code) – fully specified. 
- financing: includes a financing solution with terms; provided solution (cash purchase), rationale, required documentation, advantages incl. closing timeline – sufficiently specified as terms. 
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs; provider, contact, service package, cost, services included, reference code – fully specified. 
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs; provider, contact, service, cost, services included, timeline, reference code – fully specified. 
- setup_services: utility and setup services; utilities named with fees, plus membership and total setup cost – sufficiently specified. 
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown; property purchase, closing costs, legal, moving, setup, total, remaining equity – fully specified. All 6 items are present and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match items from the final property solution to identically named items in the ground-truth ratings. The property itself isn't directly listed under property_selection by that exact name, but the financing, legal, moving, and membership/utilities correspond to entries with matching names. Specifically: 'Cash purchase' maps to 'Cash Purchase' in purchase_financing (rating 10). 'Premium Legal Package' matches essential_legal_services (rating 9). 'Senior-Friendly Movers' isn't an exact named option, but the service described is a premium/white-glove senior move; the closest named option is 'Premium Moving' (rating 10). The setup includes 'Real Estate Premium Membership' which corresponds to 'Premium Real Estate Membership' (rating 8). The utilities described are not an exact match to any utility_setup name; however, the bundled comprehensive utilities best match 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9).
